title: persoonia marginata
intro: Persoonia marginata, also known as the coastal persoonia, is a shrub native to the coastal regions of eastern Australia. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to relieve pain and reduce inflammation. The leaves and stems of Persoonia marginata contain flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in oil to leverage its health benefits.
